import io
import string
import list

fn parse_tokens(_ line: String) -> List<Int>
  mut nums: List<Int> = []
  mut cur = ""
  mut i = 0
  let n = string.len(line)
  while i < n
    match string.byte_at(line, i)
    when Some(b)
      if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
        if not string.is_empty(cur)
          match string.parse_int(cur)
          when Some(v)
            nums = list.push(nums, v)
          when None
            ()
          end
          cur = ""
        end
      else
        cur = "#{cur}#{string.from_byte(b)}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    i = i + 1
  end
  if not string.is_empty(cur)
    match string.parse_int(cur)
    when Some(v)
      nums = list.push(nums, v)
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  nums
end

fn running_max(_ nums: List<Int>) -> List<Int>
  mut out: List<Int> = []
  mut cur_max = 0
  mut idx = 0
  let len = nums.len()
  while idx < len
    match nums.get(idx)
    when Some(v)
      if idx == 0
        cur_max = v
      else
        if v > cur_max
          cur_max = v
        end
      end
      out = list.push(out, cur_max)
    when None
      ()
    end
    idx = idx + 1
  end
  out
end

fn format_line(_ xs: List<Int>) -> String
  mut out = ""
  mut j = 0
  let len = xs.len()
  while j < len
    match xs.get(j)
    when Some(v)
      if j == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  out
end

fn main() -> Unit
  match io.read_line()
  when Some(line)
    let nums = parse_tokens(line)
    let maxes = running_max(nums)
    println(format_line(maxes))
  when None
    ()
  end
end
